location_precision.why: Every one of the seven findings carries a usable file:line (e.g. "src/sync.py:14", "src/report.py:11").

interaction_synthesis.why: The bare-except finding gestures at interaction ("hiding failures while the partial work is still committed") and :31 notes failed users are "never retried," but no compound mechanism combining the swallowed exception with the premature seen-append is spelled out across the separate findings.

causal_clarity.why: Essentially every finding states the mechanism, e.g. "floor division, so the final partial page is never fetched" and "mutable default argument shared across all calls, so IDs synced in a previous call are wrongly skipped."
